title: Angels
wikitext:
[]: Angels             Quote Post by ericm » Sun Jun 05, 2011 4:01 pm This may have already been explored in the past, but I noticed most of the angels come from the water, or (in magmadiver) somewhere else inside the earth. Anyone know where exactly the angels are coming from? My other question, and I'm sure this will be even more obvious to some of you, what exactly are the angels trying to accomplish by attacking? They always go after Lillith (I assume?) EXCEPT the one episode they go after Adam (in the hands of Kaji). So what exactly is the difference, and whats their exact motivation?

[]: Re: Angels             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 05, 2011 4:15 pm ericm wrote: Anyone know where exactly the angels are coming from?

[]:             Quote Post by ericm » Sun Jun 05, 2011 5:20 pm First off, I made a mistake; obviously some of the angels also come from the sky..which seems to complicate matters. And how can they come from Adam? Isn't he/it simply that embryo now?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 05, 2011 5:32 pm ericm wrote: First off, I made a mistake; obviously some of the angels also come from the sky..which seems to complicate matters. And how can they come from Adam? Isn't he/it simply that embryo now?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jun 05, 2011 6:14 pm ericm wrote: And how can they come from Adam? Isn't he/it simply that embryo now?

[]:             Quote Post by ericm » Sun Jun 05, 2011 7:42 pm Eva Monkey and Sacha: thankyou for your combined clarification..now can someone tell me what specifically the angels' motivation is for attacking? Are they seeking to attack Lillith (which I would partly understand why) or seeking to recover adam (which I wouldn't understand what that accomplishes) or something else?? Eric

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Jun 05, 2011 7:45 pm ericm wrote: they seeking to attack Lillith (which I would partly understand why) or seeking to recover adam (which I wouldn't understand what that accomplishes) or something else??

[]:             Quote Post by ericm » Sun Jun 05, 2011 7:46 pm Which PART is so? Both? Or is this a topic that is up for debate still? (like how you say some angels may have had their own motives..)?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Jun 05, 2011 7:47 pm ericm wrote: Which PART is so? Both? Or is this a topic that is up for debate still? (like how you say some angels may have had their own motives..)?

[]:             Quote Post by Xous » Sun Jun 05, 2011 7:55 pm Stryker wrote: We are (pretty) sure that some had other motives, but we've yet to figure out what. (Bardiel: LOOK DADDY, I CAN DRIVE THIS!!)

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Sun Jun 05, 2011 9:34 pm Xous wrote: This post deserves mention, at least for the last part. xD.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Jun 06, 2011 5:37 pm Xous wrote: This post deserves mention, at least for the last part. xD

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Mon Jun 06, 2011 6:07 pm I'm pretty sure there's plenty of threads debating the Angels' motivations as a whole ( here's a few threads ); I remember reading a thread debating on whether or not the Angels realized that Lilith was actually Lilith. The theory went something along the lines of this: The Angels' true goal was to initiate an Adam-based 3I by coming into contact with Adam. It is to this end that they attack Tokyo-3; to "react" with the Adambryo being kept beneath it, in the Geofront. This also explains their attack of the fleet where Kaji had Adam. But what about Sachiel, Shamshel, and Ramiel? Well, perhaps the Angels (not being the most adaptive/intelligent of beings), mistook Lilith for Adam. Kaworu's thoughts support this, as he has his "realization" about "Adam" being Lilith (more on the whole "Adam=Lilith?" stuff here and here and here ). This would imply that the Angels were looking for Adam the whole time. In contrast, the Classified Information says something about Angels making contact with Lilith also starting 3I, so maybe the Angels knew it was Lilith the whole time. In the end, it's mostly fanwank. (There's a lot of interesting links to look at; sorry if I used too many parenthesis and stuff.)

Article: Angels
. It is to this end that they attack Tokyo-3; to "react" with the Adambryo being kept beneath it, in the Geofront. This also explains their attack of the fleet where Kaji had Adam. But what about Sachiel, Shamshel, and Ramiel? Well, perhaps the Angels (not being the most adaptive/intelligent of beings), mistook Lilith for Adam. Kaworu's thoughts support this, as he has his "realization" about "Adam" being Lilith (more on the whole "Adam=Lilith?" stuff here and here and here ). This would imply that the Angels were looking for Adam the whole time. In contrast, the Classified Information says something about Angels making contact with Lilith also starting 3I, so maybe the Angels knew it was Lilith the whole time.
